name: kin-crypto-dashboard
description: Real-time crypto market dashboard: React + Fastify + Postgres, fed by a single shared CoinGecko refresh loop.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @kin/types && npm run build -w @kin/server && npm run build -w @kin/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @kin/types && npm run typecheck -w @kin/server && npm run typecheck -w @kin/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @kin/types && npm run test -w @kin/server && npm run test -w @kin/web
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @kin/types && npm run dev -w @kin/server
